Home / Lore / Review queue

Human control

Lore Review Queue

Source-reviewed work remains here until a designated human editor approves it. Missing evidence stays visible.

Records awaiting approval

  • Aaron Keenersource reviewed

    This version deliberately stops at the Warlords of New York opening premise; later seasonal status changes need a separate current-canon review.

  • Andrew Ellissource reviewed

    Later seasonal developments involving Ellis are outside this first campaign-and-Episode-1 record.

  • Black Tusksource reviewed

    Command structure and current seasonal leadership are intentionally deferred pending a later-canon source review.

  • Black Tusk Siege of Washingtonsource reviewed

    This event page covers the official 2020 recap and does not yet enumerate every invaded mission.

  • Camp White Oaksource reviewed

    Later seasonal uses of this location must be versioned separately.

  • Camp White Oaksource reviewed

    Later reuse of Camp White Oak in seasonal missions is outside this Episode 1 record.

  • Capitol Hillsource reviewed

    This page records the narrative location; an objective-level Capitol Building mission record remains pending direct capture.

  • Cleanerssource reviewed

    This page covers the official Warlords of New York faction recap and not every later seasonal change.

  • Coney Islandsource reviewed

    Mission routes and collectible coordinates remain pending direct capture.

  • Coney Island Amusement Parksource reviewed

    This record contains the official mission premise only; detailed objectives and audio evidence remain pending.

  • Coney Island Ballparksource reviewed

    Dialogue and objective-by-objective transcription remain pending direct capture.

  • DARPA Research Labssource reviewed

    Prototype names and encounter details are withheld until direct mission evidence is captured.

  • Directive 51 (NSPD-51 / HSPD-20)source reviewed

    The public directive and The Division's fictional extension are deliberately separated. Human editorial approval is pending.

  • Division Network Crisissource reviewed

    Exact mission-by-mission chronology will be added after a base-campaign mission inventory.

  • Emeline Shawsource reviewed

    Origin and ideology claims await direct Outcast collectible evidence.

  • Faye Lausource reviewed

    This record intentionally stops at the early Division 2 network appearance; Faye Lau's later arc needs its own current-canon source pass.

  • Gordon Amherstsource reviewed

    Claims are limited to the official 2020 narrative recap; motive details need direct collectible or mission locators before expansion.

  • Green Poisonsource reviewed

    This page covers the foundational outbreak only; later antiviral and variant developments require separate versioned records.

  • Green Poison Outbreaksource reviewed

    The timeline uses a relative Black Friday label because this batch does not establish an exact calendar year from direct game evidence.

  • Hyenassource reviewed

    Founding history and leadership are withheld until direct collectible or mission evidence is inventoried.

  • James Dragovsource reviewed

    Mission outcome and personal history remain outside this opening-premise record.

  • Jessica Kandelsource reviewed

    Specific laboratory work and dialogue require direct mission or collectible evidence.

  • Joe Ferrosource reviewed

    Biographical details beyond the official faction recap remain pending direct evidence.

  • Joint Task Forcesource reviewed

    Command structure, named officers and regional JTF operations require direct mission and collectible evidence.

  • Larae Barrettsource reviewed

    The title follows the established character spelling; one recap body renders the surname as Barret.

  • Last Man Battalionsource reviewed

    Founding, leadership and unit structure require direct first-game mission and collectible evidence.

  • Lower Manhattansource reviewed

    Named zones, missions and collectible locations remain outside this overview.

  • Lower Manhattan Biological Attacksource reviewed

    The public page summarizes the official expansion setup without reproducing mission dialogue.

  • Manhattan Dark Zonesource reviewed

    This overview covers the original Manhattan Dark Zone, not the separate Dark Zones in The Division 2.

  • Manning National Zoosource reviewed

    Environmental text and exact collectible locations require direct capture.

  • Manning National Zoosource reviewed

    The official mission brief supports this narrative overview; encounter and collectible details remain pending.

  • Midtown Manhattansource reviewed

    District and landmark records will be separated after a first-game location inventory.

  • Operation Dark Wintersource reviewed

    All public claims are tied to primary or official sources. Human editorial approval is pending.

  • Outcastssource reviewed

    This is intentionally a limited page. Origin, ideology and named leadership will not be added until direct mission or collectible evidence is captured and registered.

  • Peacekeeperssource reviewed

    Named members and settlement-level details await direct game evidence.

  • Rick Valassisource reviewed

    Broadcast-by-broadcast coverage belongs to the collectible intake and speaker-review workflow.

  • Rikerssource reviewed

    Later Riker leadership and seasonal activity require separate version tracking.

  • SHD Activationsource reviewed

    Wave-level personnel lists remain outside this overview pending direct collectible evidence.

  • Strategic Homeland Divisionsource reviewed

    Core institutional claims are based on official Ubisoft material; later changes to SHD leadership remain outside this first-pass scope.

  • The Pentagonsource reviewed

    Room-level evidence and environmental storytelling remain future records.

  • The Pentagonsource reviewed

    Pentagon Breach is acknowledged but will receive its own record only after direct objective capture.

  • Tidal Basinsource reviewed

    The record does not yet map mission objectives, encounters or collectibles.

  • Tidal Basinsource reviewed

    The page records the official narrative outcome; encounters, objectives and collectibles still require direct game capture.

  • True Sonssource reviewed

    Leadership succession and later seasonal alliances require a separate versioned update.

  • Vitaly Tchernenkosource reviewed

    Scope ends with the official Episode 3 setup recap.

  • Vivian Conleysource reviewed

    Mission outcome and biographical detail require separate direct evidence.

  • Washington, D.C.source reviewed

    District-by-district pages and landmark histories remain a later inventory task.

Coverage still being inventoried

  • Lore-bearing collectiblesinventory pending

    Category and set totals will be added only after direct in-game inventory evidence is available.

  • Peoplein progress

    Twelve core people now have source-reviewed overview records across the outbreak, campaign and early Episodes; no completeness claim has been made.

  • Factions and organizationsin progress

    Eight factions, SHD and the JTF now have source-reviewed overview records; leadership and subgroup coverage remains incomplete.

  • Locationsin progress

    Ten major locations in The Division 2's narrative and its first-game context have overview records; district and landmark coverage remains incomplete.

  • Missions and eventsin progress

    Five core events form a sourced relative timeline and seven Episode/stronghold missions have overview records; base-campaign and later seasonal mission coverage remains incomplete.

  • Diseases and conceptsin progress

    Green Poison has a foundational overview; antiviral, variants and technical concepts remain separate future records.

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.

Lore Archive / Methodology / Corrections / YouTube @raigulus
